_note: TEMPLATE — synthetic values only. Copy to config/owner-inputs.json (GITIGNORED) and replace with real owner-supplied data. Real loan balances are owner-confidential and must NEVER be committed. Keyed by AppFolio property id. loan:null means owned free & clear. Rules (master plan §4.4): per item, *_escrowed and *_via_pm are mutually exclusive; if *_escrowed is true, monthly_pi must be P&I ONLY (exclude escrow); balance_as_of older than 15 months is flagged stale. Run validateOwnerInputs() before trusting this file.

_schema.properties.<propertyId>.loan: null | { lender, balance, balance_as_of (YYYY-MM-DD), rate_pct (percent e.g. 6.25), monthly_pi (P&I only), term_months, origination }
_schema.properties.<propertyId>.carry: { hoa_monthly, tax_annual, taxes_via_pm, tax_escrowed, insurance_annual, insurance_via_pm, insurance_escrowed }
